name: Crockpot Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sauce, cooked hamburger, shells, and mushrooms in a bowl.
2. Pour half of this mixture into the crockpot.
3. Add sour cream and sliced provolone over the top.
4. Sprinkle sliced mozzarella on top.
5. Pour the remaining sauce mixture over the cheese.
6. Cook on low for 6-7 hours.
Note: This dish is excellent and great for parties!
